mainHero.title: JMB SOLUTIONS BH
mainHero.subtitle: Supply Chain Services
mainHero.description: I offer supply chain and consulting services to businesses selling on Amazon FBA and other ecommerce platforms in the United States, the EU, the United Kingdom, Canada, Mexico, and Australia. I have over 3 years of experience working with top Amazon sellers.

secondaryAction.href: mailto:jonybendjouya@gmail.com?subject=Hello, I'd like more info on your services

items.title: 🌐 Services
items.description: My services include sourcing suppliers in China, Brazil, and Argentina; managing production; international logistics; handling imports/exports; 3PL warehouse management; inventory management; and managing stock and shipping on e-commerce platforms.

items.title: 📈 Forecasts
items.description:
I make accurate purchase and sales forecasts, reducing your costs and avoiding both stock shortages and overstock. I make sure your productions comply with Amazon's policies according to each market. 

 In this way, you will reduce your costs, increase your sales and profits, and achieve growth in your company.

items.title: 🤝 Supporting companies
items.description: I am dedicated to supporting companies throughout their growth journey because their success is my success, and it fuels my drive to keep evolving. Whether it’ s large corporations or small businesses, there are no limits to your growth, the entire world is your market.

features.subtitle: Services that I offer
features.description: I offer a wide range of services to help you manage your business. From manufacturing to logistics and inventory management, I can help you with all your needs.

items.name: 📦 Manufacturing
items.description:
- Making purchase projections based on qualitative and quantitative market analysis to manufacture adequate quantities, avoiding both stock shortages and overstock.
- Managing end-to-end supply chain operations, including sourcing, manufacturing, transportation, and inventory management.
- Dealing with suppliers to ensure clear and concise information for production.
- End-to-end production monitoring.
- Requesting documentation according to the destination market.
- Providing suppliers with all the necessary information for production.
- Ensuring that suppliers carry out productions correctly and meet quality standards, ensuring that productions comply with Amazon’s policies.
- Controlling packaging and palletizing according to international logistics standards.
items.link: mailto:jonybendjouya@gmail.com?subject=Hello, I'd like more info on your manufacturing services

items.name: 🚢 Logistics
items.description:
- Dealing with forwarders and obtaining the best international freight quotes according to market prices.
 - Coordinating shipments between suppliers and forwarders, ensuring that documentation is complete and correct, and managing supplier certifications as needed for destination markets.
 - Consolidating goods from different suppliers.
 - Coordinating FCL/LCL shipments according to the most efficient option based on production.
 - Obtaining the best HS CODE for merchandise for customs in the destination market.
 - Tracking shipments throughout the entire journey.
 - Coordinating with customs brokers to ensure a smooth import process.
 - Coordinating with inland freight managers for the delivery of merchandise at the destination
items.link: mailto:jonybendjouya@gmail.com?subject=Hello, I'd like more info on your logistics services

items.name: 🛠️ Inventory Management
items.description:
- Working with warehouse managers to ensure they receive all the necessary documentation and that merchandise is received without issues.
- Calculating production costs when they arrive at the destination.
- Coordinating with 3PL warehouses to prepare and ship merchandise correctly.
- Warehousing and 3PL management.
- Preparing necessary labeling and documentation.
- Coordinating and preparing shipments for wholesale customers.
items.link: mailto:jonybendjouya@gmail.com?subject=Hello, I'd like more info on your inventory management services

items.name: 🚀 Amazon FBA
items.description:
- Making weekly projections for each market to send the correct quantities to Amazon warehouses.
- Monitoring inventory in Amazon and replenishing as needed.
- Making purchase and sales projections.
- Coordinating with couriers for pick-up.
- Tracking delivery of shipments to Amazon.
- Handling shipments to Amazon AWD.
- Resolving inventory issues that may arise on Amazon.
items.link: mailto:jonybendjouya@gmail.com?subject=Hello, I'd like more info on your Amazon FBA services
